creator: kdeguchi@sz.tokoha-u.ac.jp
text:
Created attachment 239580
Update to pkg_replace-20230119

*Enabled to handle locked packages with new "-U" option.
 If "-U" option is not present, locked packages are skipped. See pkg_replace(1).
*Variables containing file and directory are enclosed in double quotes.
*Fix trap action.

Full Changelog:
https://github.com/kdeguchi/pkg_replace/compare/20230107...20230119
